summary: Day 11 Auto Contract Generation & Sending - All 11 backend tests passed. Full auto-contract flow verified: create lead -> create quote -> send quote -> accept quote via public endpoint -> contract auto-generated with SENT status. Frontend contracts tab working correctly showing multiple contracts with status badges.
critical_code_review_comments: autoGenerateContract function in quotes.ts correctly triggers on quote acceptance (line 934)
Industry mapping INDUSTRY_TO_CONTRACT_TYPE correctly maps user's primaryIndustry to contract template
Contract templates (CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_INLINE) properly fill with lead data using {{placeholders}}
Contract created with status SENT and sentAt timestamp set correctly
Portal endpoint GET /api/portal/:token correctly returns contracts with SENT/VIEWED/AGREED statuses only
GET /api/leads/:leadId/contracts uses OR clause for assignedTo and quote creator - works as expected
Portal contract agreement POST /api/contracts/:id/agree properly validates portalToken

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Contracts tab working, contracts display correctly with status badges

seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing: TEST_AutoContract_*, TEST_PortalAgree_*, TEST_IndustryTemplate_*. All leads have auto-generated contracts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Day 11 auto-contract generation fully tested. Key flows verified: (1) Quote acceptance triggers autoGenerateContract(), (2) Contract created with SENT status and sentAt, (3) Contract content populated from quote data, (4) Industry-specific templates used based on user's primaryIndustry, (5) Portal endpoint returns contracts, (6) Portal contract agreement works. Cokespice lead has 9+ SENT contracts visible in portal and 12+ contracts in admin view.

features_tested.Frontend contracts tab: PASSED - displays contracts with status badges

mocked_apis.note: Email sending via Resend is real but uses test mode. Contract emails are queued via sendContractSentEmail function.
